title: 2007-2021 Toyota Tundra A/C Compressor Low Side Suction Hose Removal And Installation Instructions
description: Master Technician Viktor G shows the DIY how-to replacement procedure of the air conditioning compressor low side suction hose on the 4.6L and 5.7L models. Please help support my channel by making any purchase using the following affiliate links for which I may receive a small commission, or use the Super Thanks button to donate to the channel directly.

items.name: Aftermarket hose for 4.6L 5.7L trucks using R134a refrigerant
PAG 46 compressor oil to lubricate the o-rings
